disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy retrosternal chest discomfort brought on reproducibly by walking uphill and by a consistent amount of exertion
trigger_question_examples: When exactly does the chest pain come on?
Does anything reliably bring it on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It comes on every time I walk up the hill — the same sort of distance each time. When I stop, it goes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Discomfort radiates down the ulnar aspect of the left arm
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain go anywhere else?
Does it spread to your arm, neck or jaw?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it runs down the inside of my left arm when it happens.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete resolution of the discomfort within 5-10 minutes of resting
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: If I just stop and stand still it clears completely in about five to ten minutes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest discomfort at rest and none waking him from sleep
trigger_question_examples: Do you ever get this pain when you are sitting quietly or resting?
Has it ever woken you from sleep?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — never when I'm just sitting or resting, and it's never woken me up. Only when I push myself up the hill.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Exertional breathlessness occurring together with the chest discomfort and settling with it
trigger_question_examples: Do you get short of breath with it?
Any other symptoms at the same time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do get a bit puffed at the same time, but that eases off when the chest settles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms are worse in cold weather
trigger_question_examples: Is it any worse in the cold?
Does the weather make a difference?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now you mention it, it's worse when it's cold out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms are new — began roughly four weeks ago with no prior history
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been going on?
Have you ever had anything like this before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's only started in the last month or so — I've never had it before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of hypertension and hypercholesterolaemia, both on daily medication
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got high blood pressure and high cholesterol — I take a tablet for each every day.
